glosses.ro: în cele din urmă; până la urmă

translations.vi: Cuối cùng tôi cũng làm được.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; grammatical subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb (Present, 1st sg) forming the Perfekt with the past participle 'geschafft'; carries person/number/tense.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular neuter accusative; direct object of 'geschafft'.
Sentence adverb expressing culmination/endpoint ('finally, ultimately'); scopes over the whole predicate.
Past participle (Partizip II) of the lexical verb; main predicate in Perfekt ('have managed').

translations.en: We ended up arriving on time.
translations.fr: On est finalement arrivés à l'heure.
translations.it: Alla fine siamo arrivati in orario.
translations.zh-Hans: 最后我们还是准时到了。
translations.vi: Cuối cùng chúng tôi cũng đến đúng giờ.
translations.ar: في النهاية وصلنا في الوقت المحدد.
translations.nl: Uiteindelijk kwamen we op tijd aan.
translations.nb: Til slutt kom vi fram i tide.
translations.sv: Till slut kom vi i tid.
translations.ro: Până la urmă am ajuns la timp.
translations.da: Til sidst ankom vi til tiden.
translations.ja: 結局、時間通りに着いた。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (Präteritum, 1st pl) of separable particle verb 'ankommen'; main predicate; the particle appears clause-finally as 'an'.
Sentence adverb indicating eventuality/result ('in the end/eventually'); modifies the clause.
Manner adverb modifying the verb ('arrived on time').
Separable verbal particle of 'ankommen'; forms a single lexical verb with 'kamen'; placed at clause-final position.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester bleibt schließlich nur eine Stunde.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ blaɪ̯pt ˈʃliːslɪç nuːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃtʊndə/

translations.de: Meine Schwester bleibt schließlich nur eine Stunde.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ blaɪ̯pt ˈʃliːslɪç nuːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃtʊndə/
translations.en: My sister is only staying an hour, after all.
translations.es: Al fin y al cabo, mi hermana solo se queda una hora.
translations.fr: Après tout, ma sœur ne reste qu'une heure.
translations.it: Dopotutto, mia sorella si ferma solo un'ora.
translations.ko: 어차피 내 여동생은 한 시간만 있을 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 毕竟我妹妹只待一个小时。
translations.yue: 畢竟我妹妹只係留一個鐘。
translations.ru: Всё-таки моя сестра останется всего на час.
translations.pt: Afinal, minha irmã vai ficar só uma hora.
translations.he: אחרי הכול, אחותי נשארת רק לשעה.
translations.tr: Sonuçta kız kardeşim sadece bir saat kalıyor.
translations.vi: Dù sao thì em gái tôi chỉ ở lại một tiếng thôi.
translations.ar: في النهاية أختي ستبقى ساعة واحدة فقط.
translations.nl: Tenslotte blijft mijn zus maar een uur.
translations.uk: Зрештою моя сестра залишиться лише на годину.
translations.hu: Végül is a nővérem csak egy órát marad.
translations.hi: आखिर मेरी बहन तो सिर्फ एक घंटे के लिए ही ठहर रही है.
translations.pl: W końcu moja siostra zostaje tylko na godzinę.
translations.el: Άλλωστε, η αδελφή μου μένει μόνο για μία ώρα.
translations.nb: Tross alt blir søsteren min bare en time.
translations.id: Lagi pula, adik perempuan saya cuma tinggal satu jam.
translations.sv: Trots allt stannar min syster bara en timme.
translations.ro: Până la urmă, sora mea stă doar o oră.
translations.cs: Přece jen moje sestra zůstane jen hodinu.
translations.da: Trods alt bliver min søster kun en time.
translations.fi: Loppujen lopuksi siskoni viipyy vain tunnin.
translations.ja: 結局、妹は一時間しかいない。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular nominative; agrees with 'Schwester' and marks possession.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb (Present, 3rd sg); intransitive main predicate meaning 'to stay/remain'.
Discourse/pragmatic adverb ('after all'), often used as justification or emphasis; scopes over the clause.
Focus particle limiting scope to the following phrase ('only'); modifies 'eine Stunde'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Stunde' in a temporal-accusative duration phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; duration complement (temporal accusative) with 'bleiben'.

sentences.target: Er kauft das Buch schließlich online.

translations.de: Er kauft das Buch schließlich online.
translations.en: He ends up buying the book online.
translations.es: Al final compra el libro por internet.
translations.fr: Finalement, il achète le livre en ligne.
translations.it: Alla fine compra il libro online.
translations.zh-Hans: 最后他还是在网上买了这本书。
translations.yue: 佢最後喺網上買咗嗰本書。
translations.ru: В итоге он купил книгу в интернете.
translations.pt: No fim, ele acabou comprando o livro pela internet.
translations.he: בסופו של דבר הוא קנה את הספר אונליין.
translations.vi: Cuối cùng anh ấy mua cuốn sách trên mạng.
translations.ar: في النهاية اشترى الكتاب عبر الإنترنت.
translations.nl: Uiteindelijk kocht hij het boek online.
translations.hu: Végül online vette meg a könyvet.
translations.el: Τελικά αγόρασε το βιβλίο στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Til slutt kjøpte han boka på nett.
translations.id: Akhirnya dia membeli buku itu secara online.
translations.sv: Till slut köpte han boken på nätet.
translations.ro: Până la urmă a cumpărat cartea pe internet.
translations.da: Til sidst købte han bogen på nettet.
translations.ja: 彼は結局その本をオンラインで買った。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (Present, 3rd sg); transitive main predicate.
Definite article, neuter singular accusative; determiner of 'Buch' (direct object).
Common noun, neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'kauft'.
Sentence adverb marking a final/decided outcome ('ultimately/after all'); scopes over the proposition.
Manner/medium adverb (loanword) indicating the mode of purchase; modifies 'kauft'.
